title: Diasperus pruinosus
intro: Diasperus pruinosus, also known as Diasperus, is a plant species used in traditional medicine, particularly in Ayurveda and Unani systems. The health benefits of Diasperus include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. The bioactive constituents of Diasperus include glycosides, alkaloids, and flavonoids, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. Diasperus is commonly used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and tonics, often in combination with other herbs like ghee or honey, to enhance its therapeutic effects.
